records.notes: B-Light rolling refresh. logged-out IG (sample 12, likes mostly hidden — n=2 visible). Wed 17:00 run.

engagement_rate (carry-forward 4.87% from prior eval; 가시 표본 n=1 윈도우 밖 — 추정)
er_score (1-bucket conservative downgrade: 80→60 due to n=1 historical visible only — 추정)
